name: Milanese Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring chicken stock to a boil.
2. Cut vegetables (excluding basil) and bacon into small cubes.
3. Add vegetable and bacon cubes to the boiling stock.
4. Simmer gently for 15 minutes.
5. Add bacon cubes and continue simmering for another 8 minutes.
6. Check seasoning and add salt and pepper to taste.
7. Finely chop basil leaves and stir them into the soup just before serving.
Variation: Feel free to include any additional vegetables you have on hand in this soup.
